result:
The background test run completed. The fix is complete. Here's the final summary of the changes made:

## Summary of Changes

Three files were modified to fix Python 3.12 compatibility issues in the DVC codebase:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `dvc/stage/loader.py` | Import `Mapping` from `collections.abc` instead of `collections` |
| `dvc/path_info.py` | Fix `__new__` method to use `super().__new__()` instead of removed `_from_parts()` |
| `dvc/path_info.py` | Fix `isin()` method to use `.parts` instead of removed `._cparts` attribute |
| `tests/dir_helpers.py` | Fix `TmpDir.__new__()` to use `object.__new__()` + `__init__()` instead of removed `_from_parts()` |

These minimal changes resolve the core Python 3.12 compatibility issues, allowing the affected tests to pass. The remaining test failures are due to environment issues (missing `moto` version, `python` vs `python3` command name) rather than code compatibility issues.
